business.name: Cluckin Chicken
business.oneLiner: Chicken burgers, wings, and loaded fries — fried fresh and stacked high, done KFC-style.

signature: Fried fresh to order, stacked high, and messy in the best way.

services.title: Chicken burgers
services.blurb: Crispy fillets stacked with sauce and slaw in a soft toasted bun.

services.title: Wings & tenders
services.blurb: Tossed to order in your sauce of choice, from mild to fire.

services.title: Loaded fries
services.blurb: Golden fries piled with crispy chicken, cheese, and the works.
